title: Walking the Crossroads: A Hekatean Reflection
summary: A reflection on liminal places, nervous system safety, devotion, and the courage it takes to stand where the old self and the becoming self meet.

title: Meeting the Parts We Left Behind
summary: On ritual, tenderness, protection, and the slow work of witnessing what survival once had to hide.

title: Sovereignty as Spiritual Practice
summary: Boundaries, embodiment, ritual, and choosing yourself without abandoning your softness.
